name: Nuvei
description: Nuvei — Global payment technology platform supporting 600+ payment methods, card acquiring, and alternative payment methods worldwide.

seo.title: Nuvei — Payment Gateway / PSP
seo.meta_description: Nuvei: Nuvei — Global payment technology platform supporting 600+ payment methods, card acquiring, and alternative payment methods worldwide.

when_to_use: Accepting 600+ payment methods via single global gateway integration
Processing alternative payment methods (APMs) for EU markets
Card acquiring with dynamic currency conversion for travel merchants
3DS2 authentication and fraud tools for global card acceptance

review.verdict: Global enterprise gateway with massive method coverage — pick for reach and rails, not developer delight.
review.best_for: Enterprise merchants needing global alternative payment methods at scale
review.not_for: Startups or teams wanting fast self-serve onboarding

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Custom/contact sales alone is insufficient evidence
